positive: A whimsical and stylized arrangement of bioluminescent forest fauna and flora, featuring gracefully curved silhouettes of glowing moths, crystalline fungi, and stylized woodland spirits amidst rich, interlocking leaf structures. The composition is highly symmetrical and centrally focused, emphasizing strong contrast between deep sapphire blues and vibrant emerald greens, highlighted by electric cyan accents. The overall aesthetic is a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and ethereal deep-sea bioluminescence. Full-body print design, suitable for seamless repeat pattern adaptation, crisp lines, vector-art quality, printed on a dark background.
